hero.label: Made for Rilla
hero.headline: I want to be your first SDR hire in the field.
hero.subheadline: I've spent the last year doing cold outreach for a B2B SaaS startup. I know what it takes to build a pipeline from zero. And I think Rilla's AI for field sales reps is one of the most interesting problems in sales tech right now.

whyCompany.title: You're solving a real gap in field sales coaching
whyCompany.body: Most sales coaching tools are built for inside sales. Rilla is the first to bring conversation intelligence to reps in the field — HVAC, solar, home services. That's a huge market barely touched by AI. I want to be part of building it.

whyCompany.title: You just raised and you're hiring fast
whyCompany.body: I'd rather join at 20 people than 200. The first SDRs at a company like this set the playbook — and I'm hungry enough to do that work right.

whyCompany.title: Samuel Holbrook reached out to me personally
whyCompany.body: That conversation gave me real insight into how Rilla runs sales. I came away more excited, not less. That's the signal I look for.

quote: I'm not looking for a safe entry-level role. I want to be in a room where the outcome isn't guaranteed yet and the work actually matters.
